hero.title: Track your money with less effort.
hero.description: Track expenses, income, budgets, assets, and more in one beautifully simple app.
hero.technologyStackLabel: Built with a cutting-edge modern technology stack

primaryFeatures.title: Everything you need to understand your money.
primaryFeatures.description: Miney keeps daily tracking, budgets, and assets in one focused workflow so you can see what changed and what needs attention.

features.name: Log Your Way
features.description: Log an expense with just an amount and category, or add notes, photos, multiple currencies, taxes, discounts, linked accounts, and other optional details whenever you need.

features.name: Flexible Budgets
features.description: Create budgets for categories or total spending with custom periods, flexible start dates, rollover, and detailed budget history.

features.name: All Your Assets
features.description: Track cash, bank accounts, savings, investments, and credit cards in one place, with billing cycles and payment reminders built in.

secondaryFeatures.ariaLabel: Features for tracking budgets and assets
secondaryFeatures.title: A calmer way to follow your monthly finances.
secondaryFeatures.description: Miney helps you connect everyday spending with budgets and assets, so personal finance stays readable week after week.

features.name: Powerful Insights
features.description: Explore spending with trend charts, category breakdowns, flexible time ranges, and powerful filters for books, accounts, and more.

features.name: Multi-Currency
features.description: Support for over 166 currencies with automatic exchange rates, so your finances stay accurate wherever you spend.

features.name: Cloud Sync
features.description: Your data stays securely synced across devices, so you can pick up exactly where you left off.

features.name: Private and controlled
features.description: Keep personal money details organized in a focused app built around clarity.

features.name: Asset tracking
features.description: Follow cash, cards, savings, and other balances from a single overview.

features.name: Keep routines consistent
features.description: Use reminders and recurring entries to reduce manual finance chores. (Coming soon)
